report_type.description: The field 'report_type' indicates the type ('type': http://purl.org/dc/terms/type) of report ('report': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000088) generated by the EnzyWizard-Conservation software ('software': https://schema.org/SoftwareApplication).

sequence_conservation_scores.description: The field 'sequence_conservation_scores' indicates the sequence conservation scores ('sequence conservation': http://edamontology.org/operation_0448; 'score': http://edamontology.org/data_1772) of residues ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782) calculated based on a hidden Markov model profile ('hidden Markov model': https://pyhmmer.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/plan7/hmms.html; 'profile': https://pyhmmer.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/plan7/hmms.html) generated by HMMER software ('HMMER': http://hmmer.org/documentation.html).

residue_index.description: The field 'residue_index' indicates the index ('index': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/NCIT_C25390) of the residue ('amino acid residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782).

residue_name.description: The field 'residue_name' indicates the name ('name': http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/name) of the residue ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782), using one-letter code ('one-letter code': https://iupac.qmul.ac.uk/AminoAcid/A2021.html) to represent.

hmm_profile_raw_score.description: The field 'hmm_profile_raw_score' indicates the raw score ('score': http://edamontology.org/data_1772) of the residue ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782) obtained from the hidden Markov model profile ('hidden Markov model': https://pyhmmer.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/plan7/hmms.html; 'profile': https://pyhmmer.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/plan7/hmms.html) generated by HMMER software ('HMMER': http://hmmer.org/documentation.html).

normalized_emission_probability.description: The field 'normalized_emission_probability' indicates the normalized emission probability ('emission probability': https://pyhmmer.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/plan7/hmms.html) of the residue ('residue': http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GENO_0000782) calculated based on the 'hmm_profile_raw_score'.

normalized_shannon_information_content.description: The field 'normalized_shannon_information_content' indicates the normalized Shannon information content ('Shannon entropy': https://mathworld.wolfram.com/Entropy.html; 'information content': https://www.ebsco.com/research-starters/library-and-information-science/information-content) of the residue position, calculated based on the 'normalized_emission_probability'.
